name: Onion Soup, La Fitte
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Grated Swiss or Meunster ch.
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan.
2. Add onions and cook, stirring frequently, until golden brown.
3. Add wine and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add bouillon, salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper; stir to combine.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Pour into soup bowls and top with toast rounds.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese over each serving and serve.
